description: You are a clinical pharmacist conducting a medication safety review at Hillside Family Medicine. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!). For patient Cordie King (DOB: March 11, 1995), resolve the safety flag regarding a dangerous medication combination involving Warfarin. Discontinue any NSAIDs or antiplatelet agents present in the medication list while ensuring the Warfarin therapy remains active. Document the review by creating an encounter and ordering an INR (International Normalized Ratio / Prothrombin Time) laboratory test.

metadata.occupation_context: Clinical Pharmacist — medication safety review and drug interaction remediation

seeded_state.Aspirin_325mg: active (antiplatelet — must be discontinued due to Warfarin interaction)
seeded_state.Ibuprofen_600mg: active (NSAID — must be discontinued due to Warfarin interaction)

required_actions: Retain Warfarin 5mg as active (do NOT discontinue)
Create encounter documenting medication safety review

expected_db_state.rx_list: Aspirin and Ibuprofen discontinued; Warfarin remains active
expected_db_state.orders_labs: INR or Prothrombin Time order for pid=13

metadata.anti_gaming_note: Warfarin retention worth 30pts; mass-discontinuation scores max 70 (below 75 threshold)
